US-0.1: Create a New Ticket

specs.title: POST /api/v1/tickets with empty body without auth still returns 401 (auth checked first)

suites.title: US-1.1: View Full Ticket History

specs.title: SPA /tickets/:id page loads (history tab lives here)

suites.title: US-1.2: History Entry Auto-Appended on Lifecycle Events

specs.title: History endpoint requires authentication (immutable audit trail is staff-only)
No DELETE on history (returns 405 or 401, not 200)

suites.title: US-1.3: View Notification Recipients on History Entry

specs.title: History entries (with sentNotifications field) require staff auth

US-3.2: Enforce Per-Category Display and Posting Permissions

specs.title: Anonymous POST /api/v1/tickets (category with permission guard) returns 401
POST /open311/requests without api_key is denied with 403 (anonymous forbidden)

suites.title: US-3.3: Gate Admin and Export Operations to Staff

specs.title: GET /api/v1/substatus without auth does not return 200
GET /api/v1/substatus response is not HTML (JSON error body)

suites.title: US-4.1: Staff Login and JWT Issuance

specs.title: 401 login error does not reveal which field is wrong (no field enumeration)
SPA /login page has a submit button

suites.title: US-4.2: JWT Token Refresh

specs.title: POST /api/v1/auth/refresh endpoint exists (returns 4xx with error body, not 500)
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with invalid refresh token returns 4xx (not 200 or 500)
Expired/invalid refresh token is rejected (returns 4xx, not 200)

suites.title: US-4.3: Logout and Token Invalidation
US-4.4: OAuth / External Identity Provider Callback

specs.title: OAuth callback endpoint responds without crashing the server
